Class Level

java.lang.Object
model.level.Level
Direct Known Subclasses:
Elevator, Room
public abstract class Level extends Object
Level is a place that is loaded by a txt file (getting the lvData and giving to the EntityManager) where Player can traverse and Entity can stay (managed by EntityManager). Other than that, it also save levels in the left and right of it (used by the manager for the level transition).
